long_description:
The smartnic of the BareMetal node dal1-qz1-sr3-rk051-s03 has not been reporting status since Nov 14. 

This node was tainted due to not able to gt to the smartnic. METAL-7407.

Please reach out to Beth Chen and start a team meeting when ready to investigate.
